name: git

installs.notes: Apple's Command Line Tools bundle an older git; fine if the user just needs *a* git.

commonFailures: On macOS, running `git` without Command Line Tools installed pops a GUI install dialog instead of failing cleanly.
Homebrew git can be shadowed by /usr/bin/git if /opt/homebrew/bin (or /usr/local/bin on Intel) comes later in PATH — check `which git` after install.
On Debian/Ubuntu, `apt-get install` fails with stale package lists; run `sudo apt-get update` first.
